results.taskDescription: Fetch top 15 HN posts and write a paragraph-style summary categorizing them by topic. Tests substantive synthesis from observation data.
results.output:
# Today on Hacker News

The top stories on Hacker News this cycle reveal a deep dive into the intersection of advanced computation, critical technological theory, and the ongoing evolution of software infrastructure. A major theme dominating the discussion is the rapid, sometimes unsettling, progress of Artificial Intelligence. The most striking story in this domain is the report detailing how an amateur, armed with ChatGPT, successfully solved a complex Erdős problem, highlighting the powerful new capabilities of generative AI in scientific research.
